user.title: Nice
user.description: Choose how Home Assistant should connect to your Nice device. Local control is the recommended default when your interface supports it.

data_description.connection_method: Local connects directly on your network. Cloud uses your MyNice account and the Nice cloud proxy.

local.title: Nice local control
local.description: Set up local control for a compatible Nice gate or garage-door interface. Close MyNice/MyNice Pro before validating the connection.

data_description.name: Display name for this gate in Home Assistant.
data_description.host: IP address or hostname that Home Assistant uses to reach the Nice interface on the local network.
data_description.port: Local Nice interface TLS port. The default is 443.
data_description.target_mac: Interface MAC address from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.username: NHK username from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.password: 64-character hexadecimal NHK password from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.source_id: Source/controller ID from the extracted MyNice credentials. Leave empty to use the username.
data_description.device_id: NHK device ID to control. Leave at 1 unless troubleshooting a different device.
data_description.t4_timeout_ms: Timeout sent inside local T4 requests, in milliseconds.

cloud.title: Nice cloud control
cloud.description: Sign in with your MyNice account. Compatible Nice devices with cloud proxy credentials will be discovered automatically.

data_description.username: Email address for the MyNice account.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Nice local
reauth_confirm.description: Update the local credentials for this Nice interface. The MAC address must match the existing device.

data_description.name: Display name for this gate in Home Assistant.
data_description.host: IP address or hostname that Home Assistant uses to reach the Nice interface on the local network.
data_description.port: Local Nice interface TLS port. The default is 443.
data_description.target_mac: Interface MAC address from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.username: NHK username from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.password: 64-character hexadecimal NHK password from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.source_id: Source/controller ID from the extracted MyNice credentials. Leave empty to use the username.
data_description.device_id: NHK device ID to control. Leave at 1 unless troubleshooting a different device.
data_description.t4_timeout_ms: Timeout sent inside local T4 requests, in milliseconds.

cloud_reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Nice cloud
cloud_reauth_confirm.description: The stored Nice cloud credentials for {username} no longer work. Enter the MyNice password again.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Nice local
reconfigure.description: Update the local connection settings for this Nice interface. The MAC address must match the existing device.

data_description.name: Display name for this gate in Home Assistant.
data_description.host: IP address or hostname that Home Assistant uses to reach the Nice interface on the local network.
data_description.port: Local Nice interface TLS port. The default is 443.
data_description.target_mac: Interface MAC address from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.username: NHK username from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.password: 64-character hexadecimal NHK password from the extracted MyNice credentials.
data_description.source_id: Source/controller ID from the extracted MyNice credentials. Leave empty to use the username.
data_description.device_id: NHK device ID to control. Leave at 1 unless troubleshooting a different device.
data_description.t4_timeout_ms: Timeout sent inside local T4 requests, in milliseconds.

cloud_reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Nice cloud
cloud_reconfigure.description: Update the MyNice password used for Nice cloud control for {username}.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to validate the connection. Check the connection details and Home Assistant logs for the exact failure.
error.no_devices: No controllable Nice devices were found on this MyNice account.
error.wrong_device: The MAC address does not match this configured Nice interface.

abort.already_configured: This Nice device or account is already configured
